sentence: While correspondent banking has been the backbone of global payments for decades, this model faces several challenges, including high transaction costs, slower processing times, and a global decline in correspondent banking relationships.
source: The Next Frontier of Payments Innovation

sentence: This reading of the data leads me, at this moment, to support a cut in the FOMC's policy rate at our next meeting on December 9 and 10 as a matter of risk management.
source: The Case for Continuing Rate Cuts

sentence: Of course, much has changed over the past quarter-century, so history can only be a useful reference and not a predictor of future outcomes.

sentence: I expect that the supply-side policies that I just mentioned, along with strength in AI-related investment, will continue to boost productivity gains and help ensure that inflation remains on a downward path.
